shows: Night-time exterior of the Panaderia La Buena storefront with the blue facade, illuminated 'PANADERIA LA BUENA' sign, open door, and picnic table out front
Daytime exterior of the storefront showing the light-blue building, painted mural of a boy carrying a basket of pan dulce, and the red awning with the bakery's phone number and street address

source_page: https://fnb.com-photos.com (mirrored Google Business photos for Panaderia La Buena, San Diego)
shows: Interior view of the bakery's 'Fresh Pastry' and 'Pastry' display cases filled with conchas, pan dulce, and other baked goods

source_page: https://fnb.com-photos.com (mirrored Google Business photos for Panaderia La Buena, San Diego)
shows: Interior of the bakery showing the granite sales counter, a basket of bagged bread, bakery display cases, and the back kitchen area

source_page: https://fnb.com-photos.com (mirrored Google Business photos for Panaderia La Buena, San Diego)
shows: Custom-decorated sheet cake made by the bakery for a 'Feliz Cumpleaños' celebration with a tropical beach theme, corona bottle toppers, and piped buttercream shells

Bakery flyer/rack card for custom cakes ('Pasteles para toda ocasion') listing occasions (cumpleanos, quince anos, bodas, bautizos, aniversarios), phone (619) 696-0611, hours, and a small location map; paired with a photo of a decorated sheet cake

In-store menu board with handwritten signs: Pumpkin Cheesecake Conchas ($5.00), Bolillo Relleno varieties (Chorizo, Queso Oaxaca, Quesocrema, Pepperoni, Picadillo), and Pan de Muerto Relleno de Nutella o Cajete ($5)
